params.name: Joseph's Manuscript
params.description: Joseph Murray is known as the father of organ transplantation. He is the first doctor in the world who successfully performed an organ transplantation operation and opened up a new path for modern medicine. The manuscript to which he devoted his whole life is a must-learn material for later generations!
